inputs.text: Main thoda fever mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sir dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid typically presents with more severe symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever can still be due to a viral cause

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain could be indicative of typhoid, but not conclusive yet

inputs.text: Tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur mujhe bahut weakness mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness, step-wise fever, and diarrhea after constipation are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: While gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain and diarrhea, the pattern of symptoms suggests typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with a different pattern of fever and other symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bhi bukhar hai aur main bahut thak gayi hoon, risk of intestinal perforation bhi hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Confirmation of typhoid through symptoms and investigations, risk of complications like intestinal perforation

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific pattern of symptoms and laboratory findings

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the clinical presentation and diagnostic tests
